description: A clean, professionally designed public-information graphic (vertical/square format). The background is a softly lit, bright photograph of a home interior during a move: a large open cardboard moving box in the lower-left foreground (printed with a simple dark moving-truck icon), additional stacked moving boxes and a wicker basket in the mid-ground, a sunlit window behind, and a wood floor. Overlaid text at top: 'Have you moved?' in large bold red type, followed by 'You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.' in bold blue type. Bottom-right shows the U.S. Department of Homeland Security circular seal next to the 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark in blue. The style is reassuring/clean government PSA aesthetic (red + blue federal palette). Messaging is a compliance reminder targeting immigrants/registrants about the legal obligation to report address changes promptly. Tweet adds that changing your address with USPS will not update it with USCIS and warns of penalties.
notable_text: Have you moved? You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.
